---
title: "Learning Module Narrative"
format: dyerlab-html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_extensions/dyerlab/theme_dyerlab.R")
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_dyerlab())
```

## Topic

Insert rationale for topic here.

## Data Types

```{r}
#| fig-alt: "Histogram of 100 random normal values"
x <- rnorm(100)
ggplot(data.frame(x = x), aes(x)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "#00A08A", color = NA, bins = 20) +
  labs(title = "Example Plot", x = "Value", y = "Count")
```

`This section is where you fill in all the information`

## Questions

If you have any questions for me specifically on this topic, please post as an Issue in your repository, otherwise consider posting to the discussion board on [Canvas](https://canvas.vcu.edu).
